user.title: Connect to LLM API
user.description: Set up your Configurable LLM connection. This integration works with the official Anthropic API and any Anthropic-compatible endpoint, including z.ai and self-hosted servers.

data_description.api_key: Your API key for the LLM service. For the official Anthropic API this starts with `sk-ant-`. Alternative providers issue their own keys.
data_description.base_url: The base URL of your LLM API endpoint. Leave as the default for the official Anthropic API, or replace with your provider's URL (e.g., `https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic` for z.ai, or `http://localhost:8080/v1/` for a local server).

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate with the LLM API
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key for {name}.

error.authentication_error: Authentication failed. Please check that your API key is correct and has not expired.
error.invalid_url_format: Invalid API endpoint. The URL did not return a valid API response. Make sure the base URL is correct for your provider and includes the right path and (where required) a trailing slash.

init.title: Basic settings
init.description: Configure how this conversation agent behaves and which Home Assistant features it can use.

data_description.name: The name shown for this conversation agent in Home Assistant.
data_description.prompt: Instructions telling the model how to respond. Supports Home Assistant templating.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select which Home Assistant APIs the model can use to control your devices. Only entities you have exposed will be accessible.
data_description.recommended: Use the recommended model and settings. Turn off to customise the model, token limits, thinking, web search and other advanced options.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: Choose which model to use and how prompt caching should work.

data_description.chat_model: The model used to generate responses. You can pick from the list or type a model ID for providers that don't expose a list endpoint.
data_description.prompt_caching: Optimise cost and response time. **Disabled** sends everything fresh each time, **System prompt** caches the system prompt and tools, and **Full** also caches every user message.

model.title: Model-specific options
model.description: Fine-tune the selected model. Available options depend on what the model supports.

data.max_tokens: Maximum tokens to return in response

data_description.max_tokens: Maximum length of each response, in tokens.
data_description.thinking_budget: Tokens reserved for the model's internal reasoning, out of the total maximum. Set to 1024 or higher to enable extended thinking.
data_description.thinking_effort: How much effort the model should spend reasoning. Higher values produce more thorough but slower (and more expensive) answers.
data_description.code_execution: Allow the model to execute code in a secure sandbox, useful for data analysis and complex calculations.
data_description.web_search: Allow the model to search the web for current information beyond its training cutoff.
data_description.web_search_max_uses: Limit the number of web searches the model can perform in a single response.
data_description.user_location: Use your Home Assistant home location to localise web search results.
data_description.tool_search: Discover Home Assistant tools on demand instead of loading them all upfront. Useful when many tools are exposed.

error.model_not_found: The selected model was not found. Check the model ID or try a different one.
error.thinking_budget_too_large: The thinking budget must be smaller than the maximum number of tokens.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add or change configuration while the integration is disabled. Re-enable it and try again.

data_description.name: The name shown for this AI task in Home Assistant.
data_description.recommended: Use the recommended model and settings. Turn off to customise the model and advanced options.

api_authentication_error.message: Authentication with the LLM API failed: {message}

api_error.message: Error communicating with the LLM API: {message}

api_refusal.message: The model refused to generate a response. Try rewording your request.

unexpected_chat_log_content.message: Unexpected content type in chat log: {type}

unexpected_stream_object.message: Unexpected response stream from the API. The endpoint may not be fully Anthropic-compatible.

system_message_not_found.message: No system message was found in the chat log.

user_message_not_found.message: No user message was found in the chat log when preparing attachments.

wrong_file_type.message: The file {file_path} has type {mime_type}, which is not supported by model {model}.

response_not_found.message: No assistant response was returned by the model.

json_parse_error.message: Failed to parse the model's response as JSON. The model may not have returned valid structured data.

subentry_not_found.message: The configuration entry being updated could not be found. It may have been removed.

init.title: Update deprecated model
init.description: The model **{model}** used by **{subentry_name}** ({subentry_type}) in **{entry_name}** is deprecated and will be retired on **{retirement_date}**. Please select a replacement model.

data_description.chat_model: Pick a non-deprecated model. A suggestion in the same family (Haiku / Sonnet / Opus) has been pre-filled.
